overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime exploration of a dystopian urban street. The player walks through a rain-soaked, debris-filled open lot with abandoned vehicles, passing the teal 'Wild Blue' neon sign, then proceeds under a graffiti-covered overpass into a dark, atmospheric covered parking area illuminated by burning barrels.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban lot with vehicle wreckage

agents.ego_description: walking through debris-filled open lot examining abandoned vehicles and neon signage

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing walking past abandoned cars on the left side

entered.detail: large teal neon sign reading 'WILD BLUE' mounted on building facade
wrecked red convertible with open doors and visible interior
tall skyscraper with large illuminated advertisement showing a woman's face
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
scattered trash, cardboard, and wreckage covering the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open urban lot filled with abandoned vehicles and debris. The Wild Blue neon sign glows teal on the right while palm trees and towering skyscrapers frame the background. A pedestrian in white passes by on the left as the camera moves past wrecked sports cars and concrete barricades.

scene_state.functional_zone: open lot approaching red neon building

events.description: moving away from Wild Blue sign toward building with red neon palm tree signage

agents.ego_description: traversing the open debris field toward a distant building with bright red neon lights

entered.detail: low-rise structure with bright red neon signage featuring a palm tree logo
large mounds of blue garbage bags and scattered refuse
red and white striped construction barriers

segments.scene_description: Moving across the open lot toward a low-rise building illuminated by red neon lights. Large piles of trash bags and concrete barricades litter the ground. The Wild Blue sign disappears from view as the camera focuses on the destination building ahead.

events.description: approaching the concrete overpass with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: circling back toward the Wild Blue area and approaching the overpass entrance

entered.detail: large elevated highway structure with weathered concrete supports
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art

segments.scene_description: Turning back toward the starting area with the Wild Blue sign visible again in the distance. The camera approaches a large concrete overpass covered in colorful graffiti. The environment transitions from open lot to a more structured street with curbs and overhead cover.

events.description: entering the dark covered area under the overpass with artificial neon lighting
passing burning barrels illuminating the concrete pillars with warm light

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit covered parking area with atmospheric fog and firelight

notable_agents.action: figure standing near a vehicle in the distance under the overpass

entered.detail: massive square support columns holding up the overpass structure
metal drums with open flames providing warm orange illumination
illuminated advertisements mounted on the overpass ceiling
abandoned cars lined up under the cover of the overpass

segments.scene_description: Entering the dark, foggy space beneath the overpass where artificial neon lights and burning barrels provide the only illumination. Concrete pillars line the path while abandoned vehicles sit in the shadows. A lone figure stands near a car in the distance as the camera moves deeper into the covered parking structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked urban wasteland that transitions from an open, neon-lit lot into a dark, claustrophobic underpass. It begins by weaving through abandoned sports cars and concrete barricades in an open lot, with a teal Wild Blue neon sign glowing to the right against a backdrop of towering skyscrapers. As the camera moves toward a low-rise building bathed in red neon light, the scene shifts past piles of trash bags before turning back toward the distant teal glow of the sign. The movement then leads the camera toward a graffiti-covered concrete overpass, where the open sky disappears and the environment narrows into a structured street. Finally, the shot glides into the foggy shadows beneath the overpass, where the lighting shifts to the flickering orange of burning barrels and artificial neon as the camera moves deeper into a covered parking structure.
